title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at DTDC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
